message:
feat: Add robot mode CLI for coding agents

Adds `caam robot` subcommands optimized for programmatic use by AI coding
agents. All output is JSON by default with structured errors and actionable
suggestions.

Commands:
- `caam robot status [provider]` - Full system status overview
- `caam robot next <provider>` - Suggest best profile to use with scoring
- `caam robot act <action> <provider> [profile]` - Execute actions
- `caam robot health` - Quick health check for monitoring
- `caam robot watch` - Stream status changes as NDJSON

Key features:
- JSON output by default (no --json flag needed)
- Structured errors with error codes (INVALID_PROVIDER, NO_PROFILES, etc.)
- Actionable suggestions in responses
- Timing information for performance monitoring
- Exit codes: 0=success, 1=error, 2=partial success

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
